reviews.review_description: This game is so cute!  It reminds me of Earthbound, except in VR!  Please continue with this, I love the demo and would absolutely pay for this game!
Super fun and what I have been looking for!!! Need a full game now please!!!!

reviews.review_title: This is exactly what i'm looking for.
reviews.review_description: I cant wait to see more. This is everything i wanted for my vr experience.
If we can get this to full release that is. Its a beautiful game with great graphics and AR capability for what it is. Definitely deserves more love going forward
Super fun game super similar to earth bound , can't wait for the full release

I love it!! From what little I've seen from it, I know this will make an excellent game! A few recommendations, however.

Battle music - its a bit... underwhelming to say the least. I'm lookin for some groovy earthbound jams during Battle! 

Animations - they look a bit funny. Some better animations would be deeply appreciated!

Layout change - I feel like the layout for Battle doesn't really work. Don't be afraid to steal the rolling hp from Earthbound! Also, make it so we can't see enemy hp stat.

Obviously, I respect the fact that it is a demo so...

Anyways, love it, keep it up dude 3.5/5
Enjoy this game a whole lot. I just wish they had a full version already. ￼
It is a little short but it’s a demo so what did I expect but big w

It's literally like they merged Undertale and Deltarune and slapped it into VR. It's what I've always wanted and always searched for, and today I found it. I am HYPED for the full game and if you still haven't gotten it yet, what are you doing? Actually what are you doing?
When will they release a full version of this game? ￼

The ui is so reminiscent of Earthbound from snes. The feel is so similar yet modernized just enough to add some fantastic novelty. The demo left me wanting more. Can't wait to see the finished product. This has incredible potential.
